subject: Your Account Has Been Deactivated
template:
Account Deactivated

Hello {{customerName}},

Your account has been deactivated as requested.

Account Email: {{email}}

Deactivated Date: {{deactivatedDate}}

{{#if reason}}

Reason: {{reason}}

{{/if}}

Your account data will be retained for {{retentionPeriod}} days. After this period, your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted.

What This Means:

  • You cannot log in to your account
  • Active orders will still be processed
  • You won't receive marketing emails
  • Your data will be deleted after {{retentionPeriod}} days

Changed your mind? You can reactivate your account anytime within the next {{retentionPeriod}} days.

Reactivate Account
